items.title: Dangerous heatwave to hit US ahead of holiday weekend
items.summary: A dangerous heatwave will impact a large swath of the US this week, bringing scorching temps during celebrations for America's 250th birthday.
items.whyItMatters: World and politics stories can shift public priorities, safety context, and what people need to understand next.

items.title: Aid Workers in Venezuela Fear Disease Outbreaks After Twin Quakes
items.summary: Health care workers worry that illnesses like cholera could spread in areas where clean water was already in short supply, and last week’s earthquakes destroyed water systems.
